evals.prompt: Log: 30 min guitar practice, worked on the Bach fugue trill section, finally clicking. Next time: tempo up to 80 bpm.
evals.expected_output: Creates wiki/hobbies/guitar/sessions/2026-04-26-bach-fugue-trills.md with duration_min=30, focus 'Bach fugue trill section', mood inferred (flow given 'finally clicking'), and ## Next Time = 'tempo up to 80 bpm'. Updates wiki/hobbies/guitar/overview.md: appends to ## Recent Sessions, replaces ## Next Time with the breadcrumb, bumps modified.

evals.prompt: Logged a climb — sent a 5.10b at the gym today, my first 5.10. Mood: flow.
evals.expected_output: Creates climbing session file. Detects 'first 5.10' as a milestone — surfaces: 'Sounds like a milestone — also log this as an accomplishment? (dimension: health, related_hobby: [[hobbies/climbing]])'. On user confirm, also creates wiki/accomplishments/2026-04-26-first-5-10b-sent.md with the cross-link. Hobby overview's ## Skill / Progression is updated if user provides current grade explicitly; otherwise prompts.

evals.prompt: Session: pottery class — first wheel-throwing attempt. Made 3 lopsided bowls. Frustrated but learned a lot.
evals.expected_output: If 'pottery' hobby doesn't exist, surfaces: 'No hobby "pottery" found. Scaffold a new one? (category: creative, status: active)' On confirm, scaffolds wiki/hobbies/pottery/overview.md from the template with started=today and current_focus seeded from the session, then logs the session with mood: frustrated, ## What Didn't filled with the lopsided-bowls detail, and prompts for ## Next Time before completing.
